title: oncidium distans
intro: Oncidium distans, also known as the "Green Bird's Nest," is a type of orchid that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, where it is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium distans are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and stems are often extracted and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
